expectations.text: 文件数量: 生成了10个摘要文件（每个问答1个）
expectations.evidence: Found 10 files in outputs directory: summary_01 through summary_10, each corresponding to one Q&A from the source document

expectations.text: frontmatter完整性: type、source、created/updated 字段存在
expectations.evidence: All 10 files contain required frontmatter fields: type: summary, source: [[01法答网精选答问第一批]], created: 2026-04-16, updated: 2026-04-16

expectations.text: 无占位符内容: 不含"TODO"、"待补充"、"（略）"等
expectations.evidence: grep found 0 occurrences of placeholder text (TODO, 待补充, （略）) across all output files

expectations.text: 内容提取质量: 从原文提取了实际要点，不是空壳
expectations.evidence: Content includes structured tables (e.g., 从属性类型表格, 年龄段抚养权规则表格), legal citations (e.g., 《劳动合同法》第7条, 《民法典》第1084条), expert comments with names and titles, and actual analysis. Files average 37-59 lines each with substantive content.

expectations.text: category字段: 正确分类（劳动与社会保障、婚姻家庭与继承等）
expectations.evidence: All categories are valid: 劳动与社会保障 (x2), 婚姻家庭与继承, 金融与财税, 公司商事与合规, 诉讼与仲裁 (x2), 刑事参考, 生态环境与能源, 政府与公共法律服务
